title: Assistant Store Manager - Marks & Spencer India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Marks & Spencer India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Marks & Spencer India! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Marks & Spencer India:
Marks & Spencer India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marks & Spencer India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
